content.hob:
;; Tag Browser View — browse tags hierarchically and view tagged items

(let [;; Load tree builder for data operations
      tree-builder (invoke api "require" "tag-tree-builder")

      ;; Get all items to discover tags
      all-items (get-all)

      ;; Build items-by-id lookup for local parent chain walking
      items-by-id (reduce (fn [acc it] (assoc acc (:id it) it)) {} all-items)

      ;; Discover all tag IDs used in content.tags arrays
      used-tag-ids (distinct
        (mapcat (fn [it] (or (get-in it [:content :tags]) [])) all-items))

      ;; Walk parent chains to include ancestor tags (loop/recur, no async)
      all-tag-ids (reduce
        (fn [seen tag-id]
          (loop [id tag-id acc seen]
            (if (or (nil? id) (get acc id))
              acc
              (let [it (get items-by-id id)
                    parent (get-in it [:content :parent])]
                (recur parent (assoc acc id true))))))
        {} used-tag-ids)

      ;; Filter to existing tag items and build tree
      tag-items (filter (fn [it] (get all-tag-ids (:id it))) all-items)
      tree (invoke tree-builder "buildTagTree" tag-items)

      ;; Read view state
      selected-tag (get-in item [:content :selectedTag])
      expanded-tags (or (get-in item [:content :expandedTags]) [])

      ;; Find compact card view for result rendering
      compact-view-id (let [views (find-items {:name "compact-card-view"})]
        (when (seq views) (:id (first views))))

      ;; Styles
      s-container "max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;"
      s-header "margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-border-light);"
      s-title "margin: 0; font-size: 1.25rem;"
      s-tree "display: flex; flex-direction: column;"
      s-results "margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius);"
      s-results-title "margin: 0 0 15px 0; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--color-text);"
      s-results-list "max-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto;"
      s-empty "padding: 20px; text-align: center; color: var(--color-border-dark); font-style: italic;"
      s-node-row "display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 8px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: var(--border-radius);"
      s-chevron "width: 16px; margin-right: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem; user-select: none; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0;"
      s-dot "width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; margin-right: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;"
      s-name "font-size: 0.8125rem;"
      s-error "padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--color-danger); border: 1px solid var(--color-danger); border-radius: var(--border-radius); background: var(--color-danger-light);"

      ;; Toggle expand/collapse
      toggle-expand! (fn [tag-id]
        (let [updated (if (some (fn [x] (= x tag-id)) expanded-tags)
                        (vec (filter (fn [x] (not= x tag-id)) expanded-tags))
                        (conj expanded-tags tag-id))]
          (set-item! (-> item
            (assoc-in [:content :expandedTags] updated)
            (assoc :modified (now))))))

      ;; Select a tag — find tagged items and store as attachments
      select-tag! (fn [tag-node]
        (let [tag-id (:id tag-node)
              tagged-items (filter
                (fn [it] (some (fn [t] (= t tag-id)) (or (get-in it [:content :tags]) [])))
                all-items)]
          (set-item! (-> item
            (assoc :attachments (vec (map (fn [it] {:id (:id it)}) tagged-items)))
            (assoc-in [:content :selectedTag] tag-id)
            (assoc :modified (now))))))

      ;; Recursive tree renderer (atom-based self-reference)
      render-node (atom nil)
      _ (reset! render-node (fn [node depth]
          (let [self (deref render-node)
                tag-name (invoke tree-builder "getTagName" node)
                tag-color (invoke tree-builder "getTagColor" node)
                children (:children node)
                has-children (seq children)
                is-expanded (some (fn [x] (= x (:id node))) expanded-tags)
                indent-px (+ (* depth 20) 8)]
            [:div
              [:div {:style (str s-node-row " padding-left: " indent-px "px;")
                     :on-click (fn [e] (select-tag! node))}
                ;; Expand/collapse chevron
                [:span {:style s-chevron
                        :on-click (fn [e]
                          (invoke e "stopPropagation")
                          (when has-children (toggle-expand! (:id node))))}
                  (if has-children (if is-expanded "▼" "▶") "")]
                ;; Color dot
                [:span {:style (str s-dot " background: " tag-color ";")}]
                ;; Name
                [:span {:style s-name} tag-name]]
              ;; Children (recursive)
              (when (and has-children is-expanded)
                (for [child children]
                  (self child (inc depth))))])))]

  [:div {:style s-container}
    ;; Header
    [:div {:style s-header}
      [:h2 {:style s-title} (or (:name item) "Tag Browser")]]

    ;; Tag tree
    [:div {:style s-tree}
      (for [node tree]
        ((deref render-node) node 0))]

    ;; Results (shown when a tag is selected)
    (when selected-tag
      (let [attachments (or (:attachments item) [])
            tag-name (get-fqn! selected-tag)]
        [:div {:style s-results}
          [:h3 {:style s-results-title}
            (str "Items tagged with \"" (or tag-name selected-tag) "\" (" (count attachments) ")")]
          [:div {:style s-results-list}
            (if (empty? attachments)
              [:div {:style s-empty} "No items found with this tag."]
              (for [att attachments]
                (let [child-id (if (map? att) (:id att) att)
                      child-view-id (if (and (map? att) (:view att)) (:view att) compact-view-id)]
                  [:div {:data-sort-key child-id}
                    (try
                      (let [node (render-item child-id child-view-id)]
                        (invoke node "setAttribute" "data-parent-id" (:id item))
                        node)
                      (catch err
                        [:div {:style s-error}
                          (str "Error loading item: " child-id)]))])))]]))])
